description: baseline (256,512,1024,1024) batch=1 lr=1e-4 LCMScheduler — no learning, val_loss~1.0
DDPMScheduler + lr=5e-4 — marginal gain, still no convergence at 1095M params
(128,256,512,512) attn@2-3 batch=2 lr=1e-3 — flat loss, still null predictor
(64,128,256,256) conv-only batch=4 lr=2e-3 warmup=200 — best so far, 4873 steps
(128,256,512,512) lpb=1 — new best, capacity beats step count
cosine LR decay 2e-3→1e-5 — hurts, anneals too early in 15min budget
batch=2 — more steps but noisier gradients
warmup=500 — too long, slows early training
